name: G-5 aggregator: walk skips _meta and _archived folders so substrate and retired files are not aggregated
command:
mkdir -p tree/google tree/google/_archived tree/_meta && printf 'not yaml
' > tree/_meta/INDEX.md && printf 'source:
  id: o
rules:
  - id: g-ts-old
' > tree/google/_archived/old.yaml && printf 'source:
  id: g
rules:
  - id: g-ts-001
' > tree/google/g.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/runner.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --format json --emit-load-order 2>err.txt; node -e 'const e=require("fs").readFileSync("err.txt","utf8");const m=e.match(/"load_order":\[([^\]]*)\]/);if(!m)process.exit(1);const arr=m[1];process.exit(arr.indexOf("_meta")<0 && arr.indexOf("_archived")<0 ? 0 : 1)' && echo substrate_skipped 1>&2
